unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You're the real winner!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: win (赢) + ner (人) = 赢的人，即获胜者。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 小山, 小丘, 山冈
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The four friends went to a hill.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音“黑哦”，小山上到了晚上很黑哦。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: June
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音“祝你”，六月有儿童节，祝你快乐。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 在昨天, 在昨日; 昨天
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yesterday, I picked up rubbish in the playground.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: yes (是) + ter + day (天) -> 昨天是已经发生的天。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yesterday, I picked up rubbish in the playground.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: play (玩) + ground (地面) = 玩耍的地面，就是操场。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Last Sunday, I went to a care home and read books to old people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: care (照顾) + home (家) = 专门用来照顾老人的家。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What can you learn from the three poems?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音“破门”，破门而入只为了大声朗诵这首诗。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Small and playful
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: play (玩耍) + ful (充满...的) = 充满玩耍欲望的，爱玩的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 一侧, 身边, 旁边
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He's always by my side.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音“赛道”，在赛道旁边为选手加油。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He'll be someone's eyes one day.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: some (一些) + one (人) = 某一个人。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He owned a ukulele.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 完全音译词：尤-克-里-里。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So I brought over my guitar.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 完全音译词：吉-他。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At lunchtime, I saw The new kid.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: lunch (午餐) + time (时间) = 吃午餐的时间。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But after I ate it, I felt full.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音“腹”，腹部吃得满满的，饱了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How did the boy become friends with the man in the second poem?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: be (是) + come (来) = 随时间到来，最终变成了某种状态。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How did the boy become friends with the man in the second poem?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音“赛肯的”，比赛中肯定的第二名。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Which poem do you like most? Why?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音“魔兽”，全世界玩魔兽世界的人最多。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Who's the hero in your heart?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: he (他) + ro (肉) = 满身都是肌肉的他，是一个无敌英雄。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Who's the hero in your heart?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: hear (听) + t (他) = 静静地聆听他内心的声音。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 自愿(做某事); 志愿者
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Now, my family often volunteer together.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音：哇(vol)+轮(un)+替(teer) -> 哇，大家轮流替换去做志愿者。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At first, Daming was at the front.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: first是第一，at first就是排在第一的时间点，也就是起初。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But then he slowed down.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: slow是慢，down是向下(趋势)，合起来就是把速度降下来。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: one by one vs side by side
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: One by one, his friends went past him.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 一个(one)跟着(by)另一个(one)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I saw some rubbish on the way. I picked it up.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: pick是挑选/采摘，up是向上，把东西往上采起就是捡起。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: on one's own vs by oneself
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She sat on her own.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: own是自己的，靠自己的力量/陪伴，引申为独自地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can do more volunteer work in my free time.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: free不仅指免费，也指自由的，时间是自由的就是空闲时间。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can care more about old people.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: care是照顾，about是关于，把心思放在关于某人的事上就是关心。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We can clean up a park.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: clean是干净，up强调动作彻底，彻底弄干净就是大扫除。
